name: Fake Marriage With My CEO Bestie
overview: Sia has no idea that her childhood friend Junwoo has been in love with her all his life. So when Sia approaches Junwoo to propose a contract marriage to fool her parents, he jumps at the chance. Even though they try to keep things platonic, the more time they spend together, the more uncertain their relationship becomes.

trailers.title: 20년지기 소꿉친구와 선 넘는 계약 결혼 시작 [소꿉친구 대표님과 계약결혼] 1-4화 몰아보기
